qa_pairs.question: How do users launch STAR-CCM+ in serial graphical mode on an OnDemand desktop for versions 18.04.008 or newer?
qa_pairs.answer: To launch STAR-CCM+ in serial graphical mode, users must first load `StdEnv/2023`, then either `starccm-mixed/20.06.010` or `starccm/20.06.010-R8`, and finally run the command `starccm+ -rr server`.

qa_pairs.question: What commands are necessary to run STAR-CCM+ in parallel graphical mode on a local host through an OnDemand desktop for versions 18.04.008 or newer?
qa_pairs.answer: For parallel graphical mode on a local host, load `StdEnv/2023`, followed by either `starccm-mixed/20.06.010` or `starccm/20.06.010-R8`, and then execute `starccm+ -rr server -np 2 -mpi openmpi40`.
